codeReview.summary: The fix closes the original default-host proof gap: the live smoke now fails fast if `OPENAI_BASE_URL` is set, asserts the resolved client base URL is `https://api.openai.com/v1`, and preserves the original request-id success proof.

summary: Reviewed the original failure, fix handoff/transcript, and commit 2a5d373. The updated `tests/live_core_smoke.rs` now explicitly rejects `OPENAI_BASE_URL` overrides, asserts the resolved default host before issuing the request, adds regression coverage for both conditions, and keeps the live request-id proof intact. I found no new blocking issues and no additional shared-state gaps beyond the environment guidance already updated in this fix.
